TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Si'ung == Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Si'ung. 3 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 35 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 77% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 23% niqan 8 hiyi koia. Hangan alang (Si'ung)alang Si-ung. Tnteanaq alang Hangan alang Siwon o niq kari Tay-ya ga ini klayi ka dungus na, yabi hangan seejiq ka llungu dha. Nniqan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-cu-ling-cun. Klbangan Quri dxgal Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-cu-ling-cun 4 ling hini, Seejiq Tayal o dxgal nini o rngagun dha Siwon ka hini. Kndkilan lnglingay Gaga mniq Lwo-san-cu-lwo quri hunac hunac gqian hidw yabi 3900m hiya, kika May-pa-lay-si- sipaw igi hiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Tey-c Mniq alang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Jilan kari Kari Tay-ya ,kari Tlu, kari Khilan. Snhiyaan utux Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Alang nii ga quri Tay-ya cu Bgala cu (Tseole)Cung-mo-li-la(Mererax)truma na Cya-la-pay(Karapai)cyung. Sprun bnnatas (gaya Tay-ya cu) ni (qqtaan patas Kaw-sa-cu)prajil mniq Myaw-li-seyn-tay-an-syang quri daya ayug Ta-hu hiya, kido yasa egu ka seejiq, iyux miing bgurah dxgal, kika mquri thjil mniq daya San-ping-si sipaw narac hiya, lwanun na May-pa-lay-tu, bukuy do mrana ka seejiq do duma seejiq wada thjil mniq quri San-ping-si-ciway yayung May-pa-lay-si sipaw narac hiya, ida bgurah hangan alang Si-wng-se(Si-ung),Minkwo hngkawas 52 (1963)yasa mnuda paru bgihur Ke-le-li, lama thjil tnais mniq alang Taw-san-cun-he-tow(Kawabata)ha, dhuq ,Minkwo hngkawas 80(1991)yasa snluan ka elug qpahan, seejiq do meiyah thjil mniq alang duri, sqapah msupu mniq Alang Cung-sing (T'apan) Kklaan rgrigan Qtaan bnatas patas Gaya Tay-ya cu: Tnhjilan ni skrana alang. Bnnatas Lyaw-so-cng. Knlangan Sing-ung-cwan-ke sapah paysan kuan-kuang-seyn-taw-ke. Hngkawas 1984 klabuy 150-152 klabuy 328. Hangan dxgal Taywan C-su-cuyn: Sing-cu-seyn. Bnnatas Lio-min-yi dnii. Taywan seng wun syeyn wey yueyn hwey. Hngkawas 2010 klabuy 588 Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == si'uŇč == gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč si'uŇč. * sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan * ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (si'uŇč)alaŇč si-uŇč. tnt…ôanaq alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč siwon o niq ka…ĺi taj-ja ga ini klaji ka duŇčus na, jabi ńßaŇčan s…ô…ô…üiq ka lluŇču dńßa. nniqan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč- ¶u-liŇč- ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi dxgal siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč- ¶u-liŇč- ¶un * liŇč ńßini, s…ô…ô…üiq tajal o dxgal nini o …ĺŇčagun dńßa siwon ka ńßini. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj gaga mniq lwo-san- ¶u-lwo qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ ńßuna ¶ gqian ńßidw jabi ****m ńßija, kika maj-pa-laj-si- sipaw igi ńßija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ô- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi taj-ja ,ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi kńßilan. snńßijaan utux ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč nii ga qu…ĺi taj-ja ¶u bgala ¶u (ts…ôol…ô) ¶uŇč-mo-li-la(m…ô…ĺ…ô…ĺax)t…ĺuma na ¶ja-la-paj(ka…ĺapai) ¶juŇč. sp…ĺun bnnatas (gaja taj-ja ¶u) ni (qqtaan patas kaw-sa- ¶u)p…ĺa…üil mniq mjaw-li-s…ôn-taj-an-sjaŇč qu…ĺi daja ajug ta-ńßu ńßija, kido jasa …ôgu ka s…ô…ô…üiq, ijux miiŇč bgu…ĺańß dxgal, kika mqu…ĺi tńß…üil mniq daja san-piŇč-si sipaw na…ĺa ¶ ńßija, lwanun na maj-pa-laj-tu, bukuj do m…ĺana ka s…ô…ô…üiq do duma s…ô…ô…üiq wada tńß…üil mniq qu…ĺi san-piŇč-si- ¶iwaj jajuŇč maj-pa-laj-si sipaw na…ĺa ¶ ńßija, ida bgu…ĺańß ńßaŇčan alaŇč si-wŇč-s…ô(si-uŇč),minkwo ńßŇčkawas ** (****)jasa mnuda pa…ĺu bgińßu…ĺ k…ô-l…ô-li, lama tńß…üil tnais mniq alaŇč taw-san- ¶un-ńß…ô-tow(kawabata)ńßa, dńßuq ,minkwo ńßŇčkawas **(****)jasa snluan ka …ôlug qpańßan, s…ô…ô…üiq do m…ôijańß tńß…üil mniq alaŇč du…ĺi, sqapańß msupu mniq alaŇč ¶uŇč-siŇč (t'apan) kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan qtaan bnatas patas gaja taj-ja ¶u: tnńß…üilan ni sk…ĺana alaŇč. bnnatas ljaw-so- ¶Ňč. knlaŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô sapańß pajsan kuan-kuaŇč-s…ôn-taw-k…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***-*** klabuj ***. ńßaŇčan dxgal tajwan ¶-su- ¶ujn: siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn. bnnatas lio-min-ji dnii. tajwan s…ôŇč wun sj…ôn w…ô ju…ôn ńßw…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj *** pnjańßan pnatas
S.FORM: == Si'ung == Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Si'ung. 3 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 35 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 77% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 23% niqan 8 hiyi koia. Hangan alang (Si'ung)alang Si-ung. Tnteanaq alang Hangan alang Siwon o niq kari Tay-ya ga ini klayi ka dungus na, yabi hangan seejiq ka llungu dha. Nniqan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-cu-ling-cun. Klbangan Quri dxgal Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-cu-ling-cun 4 ling hini, Seejiq Tayal o dxgal nini o rngagun dha Siwon ka hini. Kndkilan lnglingay Gaga mniq Lwo-san-cu-lwo quri hunac hunac gqian hidw yabi 3900m hiya, kika May-pa-lay-si- sipaw igi hiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Tey-c Mniq alang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Jilan kari Kari Tay-ya ,kari Tlu, kari Khilan. Snhiyaan utux Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Alang nii ga quri Tay-ya cu Bgala cu (Tseole)Cung-mo-li-la(Mererax)truma na Cya-la-pay(Karapai)cyung. Sprun bnnatas (gaya Tay-ya cu) ni (qqtaan patas Kaw-sa-cu)prajil mniq Myaw-li-seyn-tay-an-syang quri daya ayug Ta-hu hiya, kido yasa egu ka seejiq, iyux miing bgurah dxgal, kika mquri thjil mniq daya San-ping-si sipaw narac hiya, lwanun na May-pa-lay-tu, bukuy do mrana ka seejiq do duma seejiq wada thjil mniq quri San-ping-si-ciway yayung May-pa-lay-si sipaw narac hiya, ida bgurah hangan alang Si-wng-se(Si-ung),Minkwo hngkawas 52 (1963)yasa mnuda paru bgihur Ke-le-li, lama thjil tnais mniq alang Taw-san-cun-he-tow(Kawabata)ha, dhuq ,Minkwo hngkawas 80(1991)yasa snluan ka elug qpahan, seejiq do meiyah thjil mniq alang duri, sqapah msupu mniq Alang Cung-sing (T'apan) Kklaan rgrigan Qtaan bnatas patas Gaya Tay-ya cu: Tnhjilan ni skrana alang. Bnnatas Lyaw-so-cng. Knlangan Sing-ung-cwan-ke sapah paysan kuan-kuang-seyn-taw-ke. Hngkawas 1984 klabuy 150-152 klabuy 328. Hangan dxgal Taywan C-su-cuyn: Sing-cu-seyn. Bnnatas Lio-min-yi dnii. Taywan seng wun syeyn wey yueyn hwey. Hngkawas 2010 klabuy 588 Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == si'uŇč == gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč si'uŇč. * sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan * ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (si'uŇč)alaŇč si-uŇč. tnt…ôanaq alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč siwon o niq ka…ĺi taj-ja ga ini klaji ka duŇčus na, jabi ńßaŇčan s…ô…ô…üiq ka lluŇču dńßa. nniqan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč- ¶u-liŇč- ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi dxgal siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč- ¶u-liŇč- ¶un * liŇč ńßini, s…ô…ô…üiq tajal o dxgal nini o …ĺŇčagun dńßa siwon ka ńßini. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj gaga mniq lwo-san- ¶u-lwo qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ ńßuna ¶ gqian ńßidw jabi ****m ńßija, kika maj-pa-laj-si- sipaw igi ńßija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ô- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi taj-ja ,ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi kńßilan. snńßijaan utux ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč nii ga qu…ĺi taj-ja ¶u bgala ¶u (ts…ôol…ô) ¶uŇč-mo-li-la(m…ô…ĺ…ô…ĺax)t…ĺuma na ¶ja-la-paj(ka…ĺapai) ¶juŇč. sp…ĺun bnnatas (gaja taj-ja ¶u) ni (qqtaan patas kaw-sa- ¶u)p…ĺa…üil mniq mjaw-li-s…ôn-taj-an-sjaŇč qu…ĺi daja ajug ta-ńßu ńßija, kido jasa …ôgu ka s…ô…ô…üiq, ijux miiŇč bgu…ĺańß dxgal, kika mqu…ĺi tńß…üil mniq daja san-piŇč-si sipaw na…ĺa ¶ ńßija, lwanun na maj-pa-laj-tu, bukuj do m…ĺana ka s…ô…ô…üiq do duma s…ô…ô…üiq wada tńß…üil mniq qu…ĺi san-piŇč-si- ¶iwaj jajuŇč maj-pa-laj-si sipaw na…ĺa ¶ ńßija, ida bgu…ĺańß ńßaŇčan alaŇč si-wŇč-s…ô(si-uŇč),minkwo ńßŇčkawas ** (****)jasa mnuda pa…ĺu bgińßu…ĺ k…ô-l…ô-li, lama tńß…üil tnais mniq alaŇč taw-san- ¶un-ńß…ô-tow(kawabata)ńßa, dńßuq ,minkwo ńßŇčkawas **(****)jasa snluan ka …ôlug qpańßan, s…ô…ô…üiq do m…ôijańß tńß…üil mniq alaŇč du…ĺi, sqapańß msupu mniq alaŇč ¶uŇč-siŇč (t'apan) kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan qtaan bnatas patas gaja taj-ja ¶u: tnńß…üilan ni sk…ĺana alaŇč. bnnatas ljaw-so- ¶Ňč. knlaŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô sapańß pajsan kuan-kuaŇč-s…ôn-taw-k…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***-*** klabuj ***. ńßaŇčan dxgal tajwan ¶-su- ¶ujn: siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn. bnnatas lio-min-ji dnii. tajwan s…ôŇč wun sj…ôn w…ô ju…ôn ńßw…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj *** pnjańßan pnatas
